description: Land saturated with raw magical energy where the air crackles, reality is thin, and power flows like water through the ground.
biomes: Visible streams of energy flowing through the air like luminous ribbons. The ground hums and anything metal vibrates in your hand.
The lingering aftermath of great magic. The air tastes of copper, the colors are slightly wrong, and echoes of old incantations murmur.
Crackling bolts of raw energy arcing across a sky that shifts between impossible colors. The ground is scarred with glowing impact marks.
Pools of liquid light bubbling up from the earth. The water glows and the plants around the edges grow twice their natural size.
A shimmer in the atmosphere where every breath carries a faint tingle. Thoughts come faster here and dreams bleed into waking.
Thin spots where the fabric of the world has worn through. Other places are visible through the gaps, flickering and unstable.
A place where spells twist into unexpected forms and the laws of nature rewrite themselves on a whim. Nothing is predictable.
